title: Histotechnician
description:
Moderna is a clinical-stage biotechnology company pioneering mRNA therapeutics. We're creating a new class of transformative medicines.

We're seeking a Histotechnician to join our Biotechnology team in San Jose. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Process tissue specimens for microscopic examination following standard protocols
Operate histology equipment including microtomes, stainers, and embedding systems
Ensure specimen quality control and maintain accurate records
Prepare microscope slides for pathologist review
Maintain clean, organized laboratory environment and equipment
Support research activities and clinical sample processing

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Histotechnology or related field; certification preferred
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years in histopathology or clinical laboratory
